description:
Sundry is a WinGet local manifest management tool that makes it easier for you to remove manifests, make changes to them, and also aids in updating them.


> There's a project that's getting smaller and smaller in the star list. 🤔
Optimization
- pref: Some small optimizations by @DuckDuckStudio in #8
  - pref: Remove duplicate processing logic
  - style: Avoid top-level statements
  - fix: Use UPX to compress the packaged file
Full changelog: https://github.com/DuckDuckStudio/Sundry/compare/1.1.9...1.1.10
